next_action: Phase approved. Commit the staged phase-1 changes, then proceed to phase-2 comment scrub and payload guard in a separate staged review.

observations.detail: `npm run typecheck` passed for the staged changes.

Targeted Vitest run could not start in this read-only sandbox because Vite attempted to create `vitest.config.ts.timestamp-*.mjs` in the workspace and hit EPERM. This is an environment limitation, not a staged-code finding.

I confirmed the staged diff changes `DEFAULTS.handoffPath` to `null`, preserves the wider `string | null` static type, adds the config-absent `handoffPathAbs === null` assertion, and leaves init seed/merge behavior assertions intact.
